title: THE Doctor Who Client Mod
description: A Doctor Who Mod with fun Tardis Controls and Exploration at its core !
body:
![The Doctor Who Client Mod Poster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/96oAiXlp/images/08d8e5b410566e837497d0746815f346f2766cff.png)

# **THE Doctor Who Client Mod (TDWCM)**

## About
**THE Doctor Who Client Mod (TDWCM)** is a continuation of the classic Minecraft mod, "Doctor Who Client Mod," originally created by **iKingsSGC**. This revival focuses on faithfully recreating the TARDIS experience, bringing back beloved features from the past while forging new ones for the future.

---

## Features
### 🕰️ **TARDIS – Bigger on the Inside**
Experience the magic of the show with a seamless "bigger on the inside" effect. Step through the doors and see the interior from the exterior, or look out from within – it's all real-time and immersive!

![BOTI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/682f628d035910c7e692c47bf170f02c22ba36cd.png)

### 🎛️ **Fully Interactive Console**
Take control of your TARDIS with a highly detailed, fully interactive console. Built from modular blocks, every lever and button is designed to make you feel like a true Time Lord.

![Console](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/96oAiXlp/images/a31082a0b7faf290a7c289e989a372c842522830.png)

### 🖱️ **Dynamic GUI Systems**
A custom, draggable widget interface puts the power of the TARDIS at your fingertips.

- **🌌 World Selector (NEW!)** – No more just flying to coordinates! Navigate a massive, interactive galaxy map. Zoom in and out, drag to pan across star systems, and pinpoint your next destination. It also features compatibility with other mods and datapacks by locating the Nerva Beacon, allowing you to travel to dimensions added by your favourite mods!
- **📍 Translocator** – For precise control, use the Translocator to move the TARDIS using exact coordinates.
- **🎵 Music System** – Enjoy atmospheric music from the show that plays upon entering the TARDIS, setting the mood for any adventure.

![Translocator GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/96oAiXlp/images/8ab90100178bf2d6f956a0247eb133817ae7f85b.png)

![World Selector GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/96oAiXlp/images/215058fc69ba18f939fb8dc0a0fe52ed4a7e5221.png)

## Dependencies
This mod requires the following to run properly. Make sure they are installed in your `mods` folder:
1.  [Immersive Portals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zf4Szzx2/versions/HbBv6YVB/immersive_portals-6.0.7-all.jar)
2.  [Geckolib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8BmcQJ2H/versions/18qeSgOb/geckolib-neoforge-1.21.1-4.7.7.jar)
3.  [Cloth Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9s6osm5g/versions/izKINKFg/cloth-config-15.0.140-neoforge.jar)

*(Click the links to download)*
